STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-RESONANCE_CORE.des: At the start of combat, add a [gold]Gear of Ambition[/gold] and a [gold]Gear of Remembrance[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-RESONANCE_CORE.fla: A faintly humming core that resonates with the echoes of past and future.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FUSION_PLATING.des: Whenever you [gold]Fuse[/gold] an Artifact, gain 2 Block.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FUSION_PLATING.fla: Layered alloy plates that harden with each fusion.
